% PROFILE SUMMARY

\section*{PROFILE}

AI-curious engineer who actively ships AI-assisted automation in production. Uses GitHub Copilot CLI daily, has cut 85\% of manual work from a high-volume pipeline, and is excited to prototype MCP-connected agentic tools and measure their real impact on team productivity.

% ============================================================================
% WORK EXPERIENCE

\section*{WORK EXPERIENCE}

\experienceheader{Software Engineer Intern}{Traveloka · Jakarta}{Backend Development, Automation \& AI-Assisted Engineering}{Aug 2025 -- Apr 2026}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Integrated \textbf{GitHub Copilot CLI} into daily engineering workflows -- accelerating feature delivery and automated-test authoring, demonstrating how AI coding agents boost team velocity.
    \item Engineered an \textbf{automated reschedule pipeline} processing \textbf{1,000+ daily booking modifications} with 99.9\% accuracy, reducing manual intervention by \textbf{85\%} through failover mechanisms and workflow optimisation.
    \item Enhanced CI/CD pipelines with automated API testing (Karate) and auto-rollback logic; built a secure \textbf{Credential Management System} (AES-GCM encryption, audit logging) cutting security incidents by 90\%.
    \item Built real-time data-sync services with structured logging piped to \textbf{BigQuery}, enabling operational analytics dashboards.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{2pt}

\experienceheader{Full Stack Developer Intern}{PT Magna Solusi Indonesia · Jakarta}{Enterprise Application Development}{Jan 2025 -- Jun 2025}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Built RESTful APIs and full-stack modules (Spring Boot + Angular) for a production enterprise system; deployed containerised services on Docker + Kubernetes.
    \item Optimised PostgreSQL performance through indexing and stored-procedure refactoring, reducing p95 response time by \textbf{35\%}.
\end{itemize}
